case_title: AMBER SAUER VS. O'SHEAS, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAUER, AMBER AS TO DEFENDANT O'SHEAS, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA PAT O'SHEA'S MAD HATTER JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAUER, AMBER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'SHEAS, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA PAT O'SHEA'S MAD HATTER $1,557.54 PRINCIPAL, $.70 INTEREST, $148.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,706.54, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
